description: FIND-042 (iter-1) was not addressed. CRIT-713 still queries `branchCoverage.pct` from `coverage/coverage-summary.json` (contract sprint-7.md line 313). The standard @vitest/coverage-v8 (and Istanbul-format) summary uses key path `branches.pct`, not `branchCoverage.pct`. Per-file entries follow the shape `{ statements: {...}, branches: {...}, functions: {...}, lines: {...} }`. Querying `branchCoverage.pct` returns undefined for every file, so the `>=95` comparison is vacuously false and the criterion is unsatisfiable.

evidence.snippet: the JSON coverage report produced by @vitest/coverage-v8 (requires reporter: ['json-summary'] in vitest.config.ts; output path coverage/coverage-summary.json) shows branchCoverage.pct >= 95 for each of
